tweets.text: RT @dcurtis: If you can't build what you're designing, you shouldn't be designing it. This is true no matter the medium.

Whereas I think there is a tendency to charge a lower hourly rate, but charge for the time you're surfing for inspiration, learning, etc.
And honestly, having an hourly rate that is respectable motivates me to get to work. There is immediate calculable payoff to actual WORK.
My hourly rate is high, but I work fast, and I bill in 10-minute increments. I only time-track the actual moments I am working.
I am distressed by how much dishonesty must go on for people to charge a low hourly rate and still make a living. You pay in extra hours.
